global_context.scene_description: A cinematic editorial overhead flat-lay shot on a dark walnut wood surface. Two professional HVAC quote documents lying side by side, dominating the central 70% of the frame. LEFT DOCUMENT: a flashy busy quote from a generic 'PREMIER HVAC SOLUTIONS' (fictional generic brand, not a real company). The document is overdesigned: bold colorful header banner with sunburst graphics, a 'LIMITED TIME OFFER!' starburst badge in the corner, multiple asterisks and footnotes, fine print at the bottom, fake testimonial quotes, '$3,000 in REBATES!' callout, small text disclaimers. The bottom line shows: 'TOTAL: $19,800' in bold. The whole document feels chaotic, sales-pitchy, and visually busy. RIGHT DOCUMENT: a clean simple quote from 'ASH COOLING & HEATING'. The document is the opposite of the left: clean modern minimalist letterhead, just a few lines of black text on white, no graphics, no starbursts, no fine print. Reads simply: 'ASH COOLING & HEATING / NEW AC INSTALL / $9,500 / 0% APR FINANCING / PRICE MATCH GUARANTEE / Done in one day.' The contrast between the two documents is the entire mechanism. Single soft theatrical top-light catches both documents, dramatic shadow falloff to near-black walnut grain at the edges. Small headline overlaid at the top of the frame in clean bold uppercase white sans-serif: 'ONE OF THESE QUOTES IS HONEST.' Small italic caption at bottom: 'New AC install. $9,500. 0% APR. Price match. No upsells.' Mood: cold confident comparison. Editorial document still life with theatrical lighting, NOT documentary photo, NOT cartoon.

lighting.quality: dramatic falloff to near-black at edges, both documents brightly lit

composition.focal_point: the visual contrast between the chaotic left quote and the clean right ASH quote
